error.regex: (region.*overflowed by|will not fit in region|section.*is too large|ld.*FLASH.*overflow|ld.*RAM.*overflow|output.*exceeds.*region)

verdict.summary: Compiled code or data exceeds the microcontroller's memory region. Too much code for FLASH or too much data for RAM.

dead_ends.action: Increase memory region size in linker script beyond physical limits
dead_ends.why_fails: Linker script sizes must match physical memory. Exceeding them causes writes to unmapped memory and hard faults.

dead_ends.action: Disable all compiler warnings to reduce binary size
dead_ends.why_fails: Warnings are compile-time text, not code. Disabling them has zero effect on binary size.

workarounds.action: Compile with -Os to optimize for size
workarounds.how: set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE "-Os")  # or -Og for debug with some size savings

workarounds.action: Enable link-time optimization (LTO) to remove unused code
Analyze section sizes and remove large unused modules
workarounds.how: arm-none-eabi-nm --size-sort --print-size build/firmware.elf | tail -20  # find largest symbols
